name: repo
description: A self-contained 3D voxel world editor in a single HTML file. Vercel serves the static dist/ output generated by publish.sh. Three.js r128 is pulled from cdnjs at runtime.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('tiny-world-builder.html','utf8');const m=h.match(/<script>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>\s*<\/body>/);if(!m)throw new Error('inline script missing');new Function(m[1]);JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('world.schema.json','utf8'));console.log('ok')"
